[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111101 6
1 001001011 4
2 001011010 4
3 010100000 2
4 110101110 6
5 011100011 5
6 000100000 1
7 000101000 2

67 76 111101111 8
